footer.description: Professional commercial cleaning services serving South Florida's Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties. Project-based deep cleaning, floor care, and specialty services.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Specialized commercial cleaning and restoration services delivered with expert precision.

whyUs.title: Why Choose MB Clean Solutions?
whyUs.subtitle: We're not a franchise. We're your neighbors — locally owned specialists who treat every project like our reputation depends on it. Because it does.

local.title: Locally Owned & Operated
local.description: Direct owner accountability on every project. No franchise middlemen, no cookie-cutter protocols.

expert.title: Expert Specialists
expert.description: Our team specializes in project-based deep cleaning and restoration — not basic janitorial. We bring commercial-grade equipment and proven techniques.

guarantee.title: 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: Not happy with the results? We'll come back and make it right — no questions asked, no fine print.

transparent.title: Transparent Pricing
transparent.description: Upfront price ranges on every service. No hidden fees, no surprise charges. Free on-site assessments for accurate quotes.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting your space professionally cleaned is simple.

step1.title: Request a Free Estimate
step1.description: Tell us about your space and what you need. We'll schedule a free on-site assessment.

step2.title: Get Your Custom Quote
step2.description: We'll evaluate the scope, recommend the right services, and provide a transparent, detailed quote.

step3.title: We Deliver Results
step3.description: Our expert team arrives on schedule with commercial-grade equipment and delivers spotless results — guaranteed.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: MB Clean Solutions was founded with a simple mission: deliver exceptional commercial cleaning results that the big franchises can't match. As a locally owned business serving Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties, we bring a level of personal accountability and expertise that sets us apart.

guarantee.title: Our Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every project comes with our 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you're not completely happy with our work, we'll come back and make it right — at no additional cost.
